---
title: "Employee Portal"
---

```{=html}
<div class="employee-portal">

  <div class="portal-notice">
    <i class="bi bi-shield-lock-fill"></i>
    This page is reserved for employees of Pine Straw Distributors LLC only.
    Unauthorized access is prohibited.
  </div>

  <div class="portal-login">
    <h4>Employee Login</h4>
    <p class="portal-sub">Sign in to access the employee portal.</p>
    <form>
      <div class="mb-3">
        <label for="username" class="form-label">Username</label>
        <input type="text" class="form-control" id="username" placeholder="Enter username">
      </div>
      <div class="mb-3">
        <label for="password" class="form-label">Password</label>
        <input type="password" class="form-control" id="password" placeholder="Enter password">
      </div>
      <button type="submit" class="btn btn-success w-100">Sign In</button>
    </form>
  </div>

  <div class="portal-contents">
    <h5>Portal Contents</h5>
    <ul>
      <li><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text"></i> Employee Manual</li>
      <li><i class="bi bi-heart-pulse"></i> Benefits Packages</li>
      <li><i class="bi bi-calendar-check"></i> Time &amp; Attendance</li>
      <li><i class="bi bi-cash-stack"></i> Payroll Information</li>
      <li><i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Delivery Schedules</li>
      <li><i class="bi bi-envelope"></i> Company Directory</li>
    </ul>
  </div>

</div>

<style>
.employee-portal {
  max-width: 480px;
  margin: 2rem auto;
}
.portal-notice {
  background-color: #fff3cd;
  border: 1px solid #ffc107;
  border-radius: 6px;
  padding: 1rem 1.25rem;
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
  font-size: 0.92rem;
  color: #664d03;
}
.portal-notice .bi { margin-right: 0.5rem; }
.portal-login {
  background: #f8f9fa;
  border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 2rem;
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
}
.portal-login h4 { margin-bottom: 0.25rem; }
.portal-sub {
  color: #6c757d;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}
.portal-contents {
  background: #f8f9fa;
  border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 1.5rem 2rem;
}
.portal-contents h5 { margin-bottom: 1rem; color: #2D5A27; }
.portal-contents ul { list-style: none; padding-left: 0; }
.portal-contents ul li {
  padding: 0.4rem 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #e9ecef;
  color: #495057;
}
.portal-contents ul li:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
.portal-contents .bi { margin-right: 0.6rem; color: #2D5A27; }
</style>
```
